/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -fno-rtti -fsanitize=address,undefined -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/GameClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/GameServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/Networking.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/WebsocketNetworking.cpp.o -o bin/main  _deps/web-socket-networking-build/lib/libnetworking.a
